store_headline: Elementor Music WordPress Theme for Artists and Bands
store_subheadline: An Elementor music theme for artists and bands ready to build their online presence
features: Elementor-powered music website builder with custom widgets
Event listing and calendar functionality for tours and performances
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation
Advanced playlist manager with custom audio players
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
WooCommerce integration for merchandise and music sales
Contact Form 7 integration for fan engagement
Drag-and-drop page building with music-specific elements
One-click demo import with complete music website setups
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: The only Elementor-powered general-purpose music theme in the catalog — every other music theme uses WPBakery
If you already build with Elementor, Swingster integrates without learning a second page builder
Music-specific Elementor widgets — discography, playlists, events, video galleries — not found in generic Elementor themes
Full discography management, audio players, and tour dates built in — not bolted on via plugins
WooCommerce merch store included — sell music, vinyl, and merchandise without leaving the Elementor ecosystem
Slider Revolution included for high-impact hero sections and release announcements
Drag-and-drop flexibility means your page layout can change for every album era without touching code
The only theme bridging complete music-platform features and the freedom Elementor users expect
key_benefits: Build your complete music website in Elementor without sacrificing music-industry features
Launch discography pages, event listings, and a merch store in one theme
Customize every section to match each album's visual era with Elementor
Reach fans across every touchpoint — music, dates, videos, and merch
Sell music and merchandise directly to fans without third-party redirects
The only theme built for the Elementor-native music professional
design_features: Event and tour date templates with Elementor flexibility
Flexible playlist and audio player layouts
Multiple header and footer design options
Creative section layouts with drag-and-drop editing
Custom music player designs and placements

testimonials.text: A solid theme for my media company website - I had a small issue and support was quick to fix it. It makes the addition of events simple and looks great out of the box, on all mobile devices and my PC.
testimonials.author: themuskrat33

testimonials.text: Yet another great design by Wolf-Themes! Near perfect. Super-clean and easy theme to work with with wonderful design and functionality. Support (when needed) has always been there for us and are more than willing to help. Great job Wolf Team!
testimonials.author: musicproducer
